hook.summary: A UGC-style woman introduces a puzzle game that transitions into gameplay.
hook.visual_action: A woman speaks directly to the camera before a screen wipe reveals a black-and-white hidden object game set in a barn.
hook.text_overlay: you don't wanna miss this puzzle
hook.voiceover_transcript: You don't wanna miss this puzzle.

scene_flow: UGC-style woman introduces the game to the camera.
Gameplay footage showing a hidden object puzzle where cats are found in a barn.
Cut to a real cat lying next to a phone playing the game.
Close-up shots of the real cat wearing a scarf, emphasizing a cozy, slow-paced vibe.
Final end card with game logo and a call-to-action button.
on_screen_text: Munchie loves to play find the cat
though he wishes for a human version for sure
and he can drink tea while playing
audience_proxy: Cat owners and casual puzzle fans looking for a relaxing, low-stress mobile game.
